subject: Action needed: round table planning in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-5937
body: Here is a progress summary for the round table plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Alexander Fleming as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-5937. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
